clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | In the days ahead of the upcoming runoff for the State House District 34 Special Election, Greater Georgia == that, through ==, it has registered thousands of new conservative voters and achieved important milestones following launch. We have been in the field engaging hundreds of thousands of voters, reaching out to diverse communities, holding elected officials accountable for restoring faith and integrity in our elections, and working to restore voter confidence. Key metrics include: Registered thousands of new conservative voters Engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters Reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity across the state Recruited over 150 volunteers to date for mobilization efforts, including to knock doors, make phone calls, write letters, and serve as poll watchers in upcoming elections Hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities Held eight events in six counties across the state to register new voters, recruit volunteers, and expand Greater Georgia's network to prepare for 2022 Hosted nine training sessions with volunteers, many new to grassroots advocacy In addition to building the foundation for a voter mobilization network, Greater Georgia has addressed concerns of Georgians by standing up for fair elections: == a mass-mobilization == to == awareness, registration, and mobilization for the special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County, outperforming the district's 2020 state house result by 3 percentage points == == the case to unseal and == Fulton County absentee ballots from November 2020 == an == == into Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's actions Filed an open records request with Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's office concerning the millions of dollars they received from CEIR, an organization founded by Mark Zuckerberg == a digital ad campaign in == of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and == the Georgia Legislature and Gov. Kemp for their efforts * == a billboard == == the MLB's decision to relocate the All Star game from Georgia based on lies about Georgia's voting law from Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and Raphael Warnock | | | | GET OUT AND VOTE! STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 EARLY VOTING - TUESDAY, JULY 6 - FRIDAY, JULY 9 ELECTION DAY - TUESDAY, JULY 13 The runoff for the State House District 34 special election in Cobb County is coming up! Make a plan to vote to keep Georgia - and Cobb County - RED. Click == to find your polling location. We need your help coming down the home stretch, and we're recruiting volunteers to help us hold this seat. Click == to volunteer in the HD34 special election. | | | | Greater Georgia is hosting many more events to keep people involved and active in the fight for a brighter future. Our Field Team is hosting a collaborative Volunteer Training Session in partnership with the Pike, Lamar, Upson, Meriwether, and Spalding County Republican Parties, where we will show you how you can help us bring unregistered voters into the fold and defend conservative values. Dinner will be provided and will feature Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. The session will be Monday, July 26, at 6 p.m. at the Fellowship Baptist Church, 1165 Hannah's Mill Road, Thomaston, GA 30286\. To attend, please RSVP by registering on our == by Monday, July 19 at 12 p.m. Click == to RSVP and to learn more. | | | | UPDATES: | GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT REGARDING DOJ LAWSUIT Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler issued a == in response to the DOJ's suing Georgia over the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202). June 25, 2021 "Greater Georgia will continue our fight to protect the Election Integrity Act, which expands voting access and secures our elections. We will deploy every necessary resource to help defend this legislation from liberal overreach in Washington D.C.," said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. | | | | GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS OUTREACH EVENTS IN COASTAL GEORGIA Greater Georgia hosted a handful of outreach events in Statesboro, Savannah, and St. Marys featuring Kelly Loeffler June 24-25, 2021 Statesboro (June 24) | == | == | == | == | Daniel Defense Facility Tour hosted by Marty Daniel (June 24) | | | | | Savannah (June 25) | | | St. Marys (June 25) | | | | | | GREATER GEORGIA AT THE PERRY EASTMAN GUN SHOW Greater Georgia registered new voters and engaged Georgians to make sure their voices are heard June 21, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | | GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS HD34 VOLUNTEER KICKOFF Greater Georgia held an event in Cobb County with HD34 volunteers to kick off the final stretch leading up to the runoff election on July 13 June 17, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Kelly Loeffler says her project to boost Georgia conservative turnout is already showing results June 17, 2021 - == "Just four months after launching her Greater Georgia project, former Republican Sen. Kelly Loeffler says that her efforts to rebuild conservative enthusiasm and win back voters disillusioned with the election process in her state are already showing results. In a special election for state House District 34 on Tuesday, a suburban district outside Atlanta, Republican candidates received a combined 59% of the vote, outperforming the previous Republican candidate who won with 56% in November 2020 ... Though she's encouraged by the engagement the group has seen so far, 'We can't take that for granted,' Loeffler said. She hopes to 'make sure that the conservative movement is engaged in election integrity, voter registration, [and] growing our tent' year-round rather than just during election season." Click == to read the full article. | | | | A Cobb legislative race is an early skirmish in battleground 2022 June 14, 2021 - == "Voting groups founded by Democrat Stacey Abrams and Republican Kelly Loeffler are going head-to-head as each pours money and resources into the [State House District 34] race to mobilize supporters ... For the first time in a Georgia election, Fair Fight will go toe-to-toe with the Greater Georgia group that Loeffler founded to register GOP voters and motivate them to cast their ballots. The organization has launched a digital ad campaign to boost voter turnout that highlights Major League Baseball's decision to yank its All-Star game from Atlanta in protest of the new election law. And it's beefed up its door-knocking, text-messaging and phone-banking efforts, including an early June "day of action" that reached hundreds of residents. 'One of the biggest motivating factors there is making sure that there's election integrity,' said Loeffler, who lost her seat in the U.S. Senate in January. 'Early voting is going on right now, so we have poll watchers and canvassers working to make sure that their vote counts. And that work has to go on continuously.'" name: Laura Loomer
subject: Saturday morning cartoons?
body:
When you were growing up, each Saturday morning, you probably ran to the living room early in the morning, excited to watch the wall-to-wall cartoons, from Mighty Mouse to Looney Tunes.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg) When you were growing up, each Saturday morning, you probably ran to the living room early in the morning, excited to watch the wall-to-wall cartoons, from Mighty Mouse to Looney Tunes.

It was a different time, and we weren't inundated with information and the distractions of social media.

Since I'm banned on social media, I can say that my life is a little more focused.

And right now, I'm 100% focused on getting our nation on track.

Today is the 500-day mark until the Mid-Term Elections and I have a tight schedule to hit every goal and milestone for my campaign this year. [**And I need your support to make that happen.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg)

500 days. Sounds like a lot, but not at all.

It's really like 234 days because the campaign season officially kicks off on February 15th next year. The Super Bowl will be over, Valentine's Day is past, and campaigns launch everything they have at that time.

If I'm not prepared within 234 days, then I failed.

I have a War Chest to build and a team to build. You're key to that and I'm relying on your support to win.

[**Will you help?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg)

There's only four days left until the FEC Deadline and I'm close to hitting my goal, [**but I still need your help**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. At midnight on June 30th, we hit the fundraising deadline. I'm worried we won't hit our goal so [**I would really appreciate anything you can do to help**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zTblwOinZn7kY9V0o6AYxw/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg).

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/utJ4tDWP892sc763QDGIfn763uyg)

name: Ian Prior
subject: VIDEO: cops disperse school board meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by FightforSchools
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r) | |
---
Peter,

_Let me tell you a crazy story that tells you *exactly* what 's wrong with America today._

On June 22, over 200 parents showed up at the Loudoun County School Board meeting to speak out against left-wing propaganda like critical race theory and transgender extremism being taught in our schools. They came prepared to speak in the allowed comment period, and sang "The Star Spangled Banner" in protest.

So in the face of overwhelming parent objections, the school board revised their policies, right?

Wrong.

The school's superintendent declared the meeting an unlawful assembly. He told the police to step in. Two parents were even arrested.

**It 's absolutely insane. I don't know if I'd believe it if there wasn't already video of this on the internet:**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)

Instead of listening to these parents, the school district silenced them.

_But these parents aren 't the only ones that are rising up._

Have you noticed that a new viral video of a parent taking on their school board seems to break every day on social media? It's no wonder: **America's public schools are completely out of control.**

Let's review the past year of public school performance:
* Unaccountable and confusing school shutdowns.
* Mass academic failure after a year in remote schools.
* Kids struggling emotionally after a year of social isolation.

And how do school boards and school administrations react to those very real problems?

By ignoring those issues and spending millions to teach our children "critical race theory." In case you aren't familiar with CRT, here are its main points:
* America is a racist country.
* If you are white, you are a racist by definition.
* And if you support American ideals like free speech or hard work, you are _**definitely**_ racist.

Yes, they are teaching them to judge people NOT by the content of their character, but by the color of their skin. That's what they think the real emergency is. It's outrageous.

**Instead of educating them, they are teaching our children to hate America. AND YOU'RE PAYING FOR IT.**

Parents are speaking out against this indoctrination. And not only are the school boards not listening, they are actively silencing any parent who objects.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)

That's why I'm mobilizing Americans across the country to fund the battles that matter most so we can take back our schools. **[Will you join the fight today by making a donation?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)**
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)
Let me explain to you what your dollar will do. **I've got a concrete plan for parents to take back control of our public schools.** It's why I started FightforSchools.

Your donation will directly support the parent revolution that's happening across the country by:
* Organizing parents across the country to fight back.
* Equipping those parents with the resources they need to activate their neighbors.
* And financially supporting expensive electoral recalls and legal challenges to out of control school officials.

**This is an issue that 's bigger than politics.** It's not just a bunch of Republican activists - the parents we work with come from all walks of life and political persuasions. It's a common sense issue. **[And it's why WE WILL WIN.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)**

These bureaucrats need to look out, because we've done our homework. We've got an army of moms ready to take back our schools. And with your help, we can start actually fighting back at the school board level.
[**HELP ME TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)
Thank you,

Ian Prior
Founder, FightforSchools

P.S. This school board meeting is just a preview of what we're up against. It's why I'm asking you: please, donate to our efforts at this secure URL today, before it is too late: **[https://fightforschools-com-cd0f5005.revv.co/action-2502807](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57812595:JnQI0Hl0N:m:1:3253819041:822A13373E85280F79C1E3CFC96767C4:r)**

name: Tim Burchett
subject: The Left’s War On Women’s Sports 🏅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgeiuDzUNEoR5EdMqgNU8S2-m6nUrsCtkA5fjTDqnGANpNZ8f1lGif0wYf_lM2kvtv7iMps64JKDuNdfcqty-tlbkFFq9Alh198TVkqiJITiKN174kWKbUUkAOcjZ5LE-Xdl9R6KlSCyocCFHgm5gvOpZRljO52BjIgrzoW-o62r1PE-HMnr0GWsysYTPeTFJVXmRtWxPP94HhVgCBnEb_yfaFBhQGzvOcQ0aKAiqKKE3UC8NUmSFXo5yQtFL1AK4b67motts23NAepWj2ljXrMY%3D) **The Left’s War On Women’s Sports 🏅****
** _Image courtesy of USA Today_ Sports are supposed to teach discipline, teamwork, and fair play. But what happens when the game is rigged? For many female athletes, that’s what’s happening in our schools, our sports clubs, and even the Olympics. There is a growing movement to allow biological males to compete in women's sports. Now, weightlifter Laurel Hubbard will become the [first](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgddo0AAPByLPc8kxufq6-MJ5PNlADWa8UrNG9Qh_h2hYoKDVuf574RvzOHX2Y59bh0lMqpes0GUo7GtsFIGtaUNtpt1y-6vTx0jfl6LsrdAX2p_GgmvxzDoFBxrt2j9wjf7ef_1FSzKk-kA7ugNsPV9yvZfe2SxW582hbh1CEjDTdNo0BHTLdNGv9l9Wp-dq34IFDby5iGwa5Wx8usiza7YjBkcYgtL5g4__JA9nanfuR0R9zisPoCbXk_j-OJIlDN2tt64jzANgoOzgKb6nNMNiZqvYZ4B7vTb9sXgeEDNiXyk6SKPpWH55mn32JqIezVoo79hLDnZqMGdc3yq-qT8%3D) transgender athlete to compete in the Olympics in Tokyo this summer. Hubbard had previously competed against male athletes. It’s not politically correct to say this, but I’ll say it anyway: There are biological differences between men and women. Just look at the science. Men [outperform](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgeMe-yV4DzQGweVFygsjQM-yLZ2A3pmAHhi9qcriLh6WoASf8hjo1IcVXqmC9Gl6q8Vgao0H-jZnjQp4ygRx_fUpHXT94qQzYCcSrdOspsjujZ2RPqYT0zzvod6T-8qjej0e1Wt4zcAIdE8OG-IivfzrNVNZh8XfyqGmm0d8UwFnk-6LA87BVs8mMDtclVralKuD0z63KPYQe8Cl2nQyeVM2eb-2w6nwB_Us41bwIfTCPM9o4IP3FTTmIMekIaiQ0DOzDXj_TXeMoFwURwY3eBBE1xpGTV8Fr8Fp7o-4fRqfKmH_vlvZgGCjgjr3kbN_s3nb1KVXd5IoBis2hxHv48QHa5p7yZKAH5mzPMBS0WxY0NdwtAlke7ZjmhssuLj1EyNXmA4P2G3Rr0PWfpK8a3xUwQS4Resb60pj0WnsAVvRdcSDMZNZ_a6aQAz388ft2_16bh1DvvsgmfTCVhRqV-dWt2C2OuxS0u9dwpEaGtTKNBBlraUNkjjtVHJYI7xZSWAq2fxzaq93ndfd8-MFrSM%3D) women in almost every sports metric – speed, stamina, and strength. That’s why biological males and females have traditionally been separated in competitions. Allowing biological men to compete against women simply isn’t fair. It puts women at a disadvantage and stacks the deck against them. Why should women bother competing when they know they won’t get a fair shot? Unfortunately, the Biden administration is doubling down on this wokeness. The Education Department recently [issued](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgWnSOsKnPKSLgtQuFJI01EjsgqisrjkriYKcpjrfHdbr1hSyGJgURqY8kmflI81PKRLNWXSz0p8n1CmXD8sf323RbFnHdodg6FN29-ksc8TCmZvA0-0NO5otDBy9aI6Ln6IVQpnykJkrPwL0Jq72uR5gQivHw8zGxBE0pRweVtBKSJt2Ac3xqJku402i_nlRkJBq8vG_2ATdfirQvnmAW140QcHqdYlST2iiFsYHpn_lYqYQFtogeJTc0gfQyNia14F1ngOnL3f7kFPR-lg7p03rlivZzm1TCDLfBNhEtfza-Tey84WGpfeJlEDyxwHjaRhT3r3-67pdEIDZfV0IMBC6vJeN0Y0mGFZvdofB6roRC-k_Cgnb8kctpKM_JeIMY67ppT9c6ROqPRzHFJrmlt8%3D) a new edict making it easier to force schools to let biological males play against female athletes. And the Department of Justice is trying to [overturn](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgddo0AAPByLPc8kxufq6-MID7hKW9h1_DOknAxr-anpDPbxCDuxB4qrcZKRhR5SaNJH3_h1TrGRSNHeYvF9JmrzjIKL3cfWdtQp8NbGgnhpqMV3hejXvfyAfzZzVha1OmiGmSRhiQYtAGrNpHukKapIcPihTqY2NoMIgb-Q8HlOwll4Mg_wKkyaDxqLnKAUn2BFhCnjBgorTybR4El93jxHU5Ghq8nx5uhPUgCSQrI4EI1krQ5Si80GGDtNvxAi_rCt5J-lrgSPLk5nvpaPSgVPgbKIqU2KlRJzDZZ2wmRxq8n67BOlFT0Fq8fJvzcD0YXokD9AdI6C1QS8H7YsOa8Y%3D) a West Virginia law that bans biological men from playing on women’s teams, deeming it “unconstitutional.” The Left’s war on women’s sports needs to stop. → **Read more** : We must protect women’s sports (_[National Review](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgWnSOsKnPKSLgtQuFJI01EgUMelATWF0WquVbxI1huDg8o0Xo-cLyDTFcwh1VdoLhFa7nDBFzfAH_3_0WlgZRaMf-eXbtSmydPdXa-DBoyPRSnsAlhatwTvxNWW76qR8oG87cEDVkcS88h36Ab3IDqy0zI0158TIzHV1kO2qKNfRaHorv8yEOzvE1xc33nAlwCR3XwWp0tIgm3uEs_Fe8ymHdoa-cRmmA9QfXKbMJyY9y1ttetNSEj3JCDdOQU1-UaQdeWcmb0QD0AO1Hf63w82-i4dvMcXMP644tnVODGu0)_) | |

**Who Let The Dogs Out? 🎭
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgWg67gEHAsxKk3i45x3fz5gMJmpOsY1hW-rOsMB54hWldMxCSm3WCvZmIVk3ntTQk502lTgzAt0dF4aLXhgLR2u4SYzqgjACQ1y9uVdjnMZbBazMlI0G-102y5RAqxB9MJz__lgO2soRuQq539Akysd-AwhydHJXQZ0HzKXq20TTFQXO3Hlb5bSZ5HYi6UeRtEzN8M2s1DsyQCkxLtbNL1_zeWkeb93xY1oCrX3kQ56k5B1TvtdaUuFSeO9TuPNn-eP6o7JH6vImizZ8PmJahtm8qCCO4u7Eq6UlOgpy-tN5xb9gvIN7kURBoQkCYklx9Z8u55z2ddRXhnXHuQau-hyeNqS6XpWaY7bpZE0REXcH8Bv3zQywLVUC0suEgcWeP7GL-gYBD-VfEpgi1-exsxIKev4K934OVPQ9Ug0QaCnD)
_Image courtesy of the City of Knoxville website_

Knoxville will be howling on Saturday when the 14th annual Mardi Growl kicks off at World's Fair Park. Hundreds of costumed dogs and their human companions are expected to be there. Mardi Growl will have a new venue and some new events.

These include a pet show contest and a socially distanced party to replace the traditional pet parade. “It’s such a fun way to raise awareness and work toward our vision to find a home for every pet,” said Janet Testerman, CEO of Young-Williams Animal Center. [Click here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=34d4aa98998f45879ab8eadf22ab7709&_e=I7P2k0Q7GB89aCJyrufvgekty2j-T_fvH1E8UNlNP3QQf02FzqYj3IUhAcbc8JtVhzfybT-HhEhI-nCB9duNbY59o51Hoy9Xu3jKvPUvWn92doNz_pBWH98Q_YrDZVSxOqgzcT1lg3kCskEllB6EZJYoHEkzfnumMt4OfrmPl9O0SLVyqrYeGU5RDg_rdvhzsXVSXdpeDHdT0u67u-TlsdZlg5YXJQb9ewYvMD6804fuXcDo2SRhUJ85Go0GIFrrdD_hF42RGufEvCaLjfOBGQF5mlEzX5ktOnKbdU13yzlQbzn26AOLqraBUyC9ggKCd6YVZliZ5hL-hI0fP7DAqDoZA-c5g548mMYngX15X-b2hN96Qf02pCKkytU6XTc6af8y3wx-Udkys1O6BSoEWuNkpM7PIm2udCFenDmhNfsFUvubURhLk6-csNZ9lo9X) for all the details.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Can I give you a call to say thanks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
TBH, I feel like the *least* I can do is call a few people and say Thank You for donating...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210626-1849-header&t=1&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)
Hi, can I give you a phone call?
Our campaign just set an ambitious goal of raising $100,000 in online donations before our _huuuuuuge_ end-of-quarter FEC deadline on Wednesday, June 30. We've faced deadlines before. But this is bigger — it's the first full FEC fundraising quarter since I officially announced that I’m running for U.S. Senate.
It’s gonna take some collective action to pull this off, and I realize not everyone can afford to donate their hard-earned dollars to a campaign. **TBH, I feel like the least I can do is call a few people and say Thank You for donating...**
So here’s the deal 👇
[**_Make your *first-ever* $5 donation to help our campaign raise $100,000 before the FEC deadline on June 30, and you might just get a call from me + Gisele this week to say Thank You for your support. Will you please donate today?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21266?refcode=em20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21266?refcode=em20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21266?refcode=em20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)**
I’ll tell you more about it over the phone, but the latest polling indicates that our campaign is _< checks notes>_ the only one that has what it takes to win Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat.
In order for our common-sense campaign to stay this highly competitive, though, **$100,000 is the amount we absolutely must raise online through emails like this one before the FEC deadline on June 30.** I did the math like a million times.
Plus, let’s be honest. Once our Q2 fundraising numbers go public, people will use it to make judgements about the strength of our campaign. EVERYONE will see our fundraising numbers, from reporters, to primary opponents, to the flag police.
Any amount you can kick our way has a direct and immediate impact on reaching our $100,000 before the FEC deadline on June 30. And it might just land you a phone call from Gisele and me.
[**_Soooo... Is there any chance you could make your first $5 donation to our campaign today? I’m asking directly + offering to call you because raising $100,000 before June 30 is just that damn important._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21266?refcode=em20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210626%3Frefcode%3Dem20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21266?refcode=em20210626-1849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)**
Thank you *so* much for everything, and (hopefully) talk to you soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210626-1849-footer&t=25&refcode2=1849_434096_lWnxyK&akid=1849%2E434096%2ElWnxyK)**

body:
---
| | **Bad news** : right now, we’re not even 5% to our end-of-quarter goal. That:
* _Doesn’t allow us_ to hold Ron Johnson accountable
* _Doesn’t allow us_ to get out our message of why we are the best candidate to take on Ron Johnson
* _Doesn’t allow us_ to keep up with our millionaire opponents

If you want millionaires to dictate the terms of this race, then we don’t know what to tell you.

**If you want to support a grassroots campaign that will deliver Wisconsin from Ron Johnson,[then chip in now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31445194/292686574/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210626_1_2&refcode2=972e3064-a6d6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJlMzA2NC1hNmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI0wicOX4EXBX2JZwg1QYoggymb31zal4L_ikx9ZZ48=)** | | **[Chip in Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31445195/292686575/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210626_1_2&refcode2=972e3064-a6d6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJlMzA2NC1hNmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI0wicOX4EXBX2JZwg1QYoggymb31zal4L_ikx9ZZ48=)**

* * *
**— _Begin Forwarded Message_ —**

Friend,

**Let me level with you** : We have multiple candidates already in the Democratic primary. Right now, our message as the best candidate to take on Ron Johnson is at risk of being drowned out.

This isn’t because our message isn’t effective, or because we don’t have a message that is supported by most hard-working Wisconsinites. _Remember this poll?_ ↓↓↓
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31445196/292686576/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210626_1_2&refcode2=972e3064-a6d6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJlMzA2NC1hNmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI0wicOX4EXBX2JZwg1QYoggymb31zal4L_ikx9ZZ48=)
I grew up in Little Chute and have spent my life in the Fox River Valley so unlike Ron Johnson and some of my opponents, I don’t know too many Wall Street CEOs nor can I self-fund. **So our campaign truly relies on YOU.**

While that does mean you’ll get a lot of emails from my team and I, it also means that we are running a people-powered grassroots campaign that serves nobody besides the hard-working people of Wisconsin.

[_So, I’m guessing you know where this email is going._ We have a vital end-of-quarter deadline coming up on Wednesday. We must raise $30,000 by Wednesday at midnight to keep pace with Ron Johnson and our self-funding opponents. Can you help us keep pace by chipping in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31445197/292686577/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210626_1_2&refcode2=972e3064-a6d6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJlMzA2NC1hNmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI0wicOX4EXBX2JZwg1QYoggymb31zal4L_ikx9ZZ48=) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

One of the reasons we have to work hard for every dollar that we raise is because we are a unabashedly, progressive campaign that:
* Is pro-union (I even wrote a book about how I saved the local paper mill in my home state)
* Supports Medicare For All & a Green New Deal
* Wants to kill the filibuster to get progressive policies passed
* Will fight to break up Wall Street banks that are too big to fail
* Wants corporate money out of our politics
* Will make sure the rich pay their fair share in taxes. _The Jeff Bezoses of the world have enough megayachts_

I’ll say it one more time, this is the most vital deadline of this campaign yet. We must show all of our opponents that we have a grassroots army behind us.

**We need to show them that we are beyond billboards on Highway 41, we are a people-powered grassroots campaign that will deliver Wisconsin from Ron Johnson.**

[Can you help us do just that by chipping in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31445204/292686584/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210626_1_2&refcode2=972e3064-a6d6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJlMzA2NC1hNmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fI0wicOX4EXBX2JZwg1QYoggymb31zal4L_ikx9ZZ48=)

Thank you for stepping up,

Tom Nelson

clean_body: | | Bad news : right now, we’re not even 5% to our end-of-quarter goal. That: Doesn’t allow us to hold Ron Johnson accountable Doesn’t allow us to get out our message of why we are the best candidate to take on Ron Johnson Doesn’t allow us to keep up with our millionaire opponents If you want millionaires to dictate the terms of this race, then we don’t know what to tell you. If you want to support a grassroots campaign that will deliver Wisconsin from Ron Johnson,= | | = — Begin Forwarded Message — Friend, Let me level with you : We have multiple candidates already in the Democratic primary. Right now, our message as the best candidate to take on Ron Johnson is at risk of being drowned out. This isn’t because our message isn’t effective, or because we don’t have a message that is supported by most hard-working Wisconsinites. Remember this poll? ↓↓↓ = I grew up in Little Chute and have spent my life in the Fox River Valley so unlike Ron Johnson and some of my opponents, I don’t know too many Wall Street CEOs nor can I self-fund. So our campaign truly relies on YOU. While that does mean you’ll get a lot of emails from my team and I, it also means that we are running a people-powered grassroots campaign that serves nobody besides the hard-working people of Wisconsin. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = One of the reasons we have to work hard for every dollar that we raise is because we are a unabashedly, progressive campaign that: Is pro-union (I even wrote a book about how I saved the local paper mill in my home state) Supports Medicare For All & a Green New Deal Wants to kill the filibuster to get progressive policies passed Will fight to break up Wall Street banks that are too big to fail Wants corporate money out of our politics Will make sure the rich pay their fair share in taxes. The Jeff Bezoses of the world have enough megayachts I’ll say it one more time, this is the most vital deadline of this campaign yet. We must show all of our opponents that we have a grassroots army behind us. We need to show them that we are beyond billboards on Highway 41, we are a people-powered grassroots campaign that will deliver Wisconsin from Ron Johnson. = Thank you for stepping up, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

subject: California’s future is at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/JpQixXP79X1nIX1SDFKWmL6Wi9lnEgtp_6ZmTleeN7w=/k7JJaMdWdVtr6ZGq-HDbkhnvfSkQq4yE5wk2h2_2uiM=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210626_1_1)
Peter,

The June FEC deadline is approaching quickly, and I need your help.

Redistricting is right around the corner, and California is going to be crucial to holding the House for Democrats. A lot is at stake depending on redistricting -- districts controlled by Democrats could become much more competitive.

[We have an end of quarter fundraising goal of $23,216 that we can't afford to miss. Will you chip in $15 or more today before the June 30th FEC deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/JpQixXP79X1nIX1SDFKWmL6Wi9lnEgtp_6ZmTleeN7w=/k7JJaMdWdVtr6ZGq-HDbkhnvfSkQq4yE5wk2h2_2uiM=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210626_1_1)

| [DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/JpQixXP79X1nIX1SDFKWmL6Wi9lnEgtp_6ZmTleeN7w=/k7JJaMdWdVtr6ZGq-HDbkhnvfSkQq4yE5wk2h2_2uiM=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210626_1_1)
---

After the FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers go public, which means all eyes will be on us to see if we've kept up our momentum so far this year. If there are any signs of weakness, opponents looking to take back seats in the 2022 midterm elections **will** take notice.

I don't like bugging you for money, Peter, but this fundraising goal is too important to miss. [Please, chip in any amount you can to help Democrats hold the House in next year's midterm elections.](https://act.myngp.com/el/JpQixXP79X1nIX1SDFKWmL6Wi9lnEgtp_6ZmTleeN7w=/k7JJaMdWdVtr6ZGq-HDbkhnvfSkQq4yE5wk2h2_2uiM=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210626_1_1)

Your constant support means so much to me. Thank you.

-- Jimmy Panetta

There is a large influx of anti-transgender and other anti-LGBTQ+ policies being enacted all across the country. If Republicans had control of the Legislature, we would likely have seen more of these discriminatory proposals right here at home. That is why the election next year is so important and that's why we need your support. We need to act now to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ Minnesotans. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1vix7yBJtClGkuskof_3tR-tQasrrL5ehxdka4It8Us=/RrvTyCxO4eQjPit3W_KyLyyE2NTXOEa0Hbnosyxg6BY=?refcode=062621)

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Reminder: Electing True Representation
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Washington's 3rd Congressional District is becoming the focus of national attention as the 2022 election season heats up. This election poses questions every citizen should be asking. Who will best represent my vision for America? Who will address the concerns of my community in the national dialogue?

America was built around the idea of representation-- local citizens who would go to Washington DC and voice local concerns and local issues on the national platform. Somehow we've evolved into something quite different when someone like Hillary Rodham Clinton buys a home in New York in order to represent the interests of New Yorkers in the United States Senate.

Locally, we have seen several candidates suddenly appear in Washington's 3rd District with hopes of being elected to Congress. Opportunistic at best, these candidates have no history and no connection to those they seek to represent. While some have experience in Washington DC and others have experience in foreign countries only one has any significant experience in the 3rd Congressional District.

Heidi St. John has lived and worked in the heart of our district for nearly 20 years, serving our community. All seven of her children still live in the district including her married, adult children and her grandchildren. Her heart will always be here. She is one of us.

To be elected to speak on behalf of friends and neighbors is a high honor and not to be taken lightly. Only Heidi St John is one of us. We know her and she knows us. We have benefited from her leadership in the 3rd District for years, and we know she will represent our concerns and be our voice when she is elected.

America has enough political opportunists in Washington DC already.

To learn more about Heidi St John and to learn how to support her campaign, visit[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z-CTZKZWYbBjqststHdbHcheY1lDaNZNaxsusNMH1P57nsuUjr9heaGcAz43NcYykJ47SmuFzNgd5JriAbyeE_hqHnUT9EiEXDniVZCeJzwxXftIM-sNB5L6bYdAl2egmwh6s35QKMWLrl1gWau85sY5nzViwa1SvoJFAXwiKPU=&c=xHZjREbvlziDp27nZ1uNzWC7-U0HwYad4NhNWZUD_mQk8G2vAbuyEQ==&ch=JRXuFnTogFPUMovePQOI7vEmM8GOM2-b7nHU4TdahG0wWlu0brL0nA==)[www.heidistjohnforcongresss.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z-CTZKZWYbBjqststHdbHcheY1lDaNZNaxsusNMH1P57nsuUjr9heaGcAz43NcYykJ47SmuFzNgd5JriAbyeE_hqHnUT9EiEXDniVZCeJzwxXftIM-sNB5L6bYdAl2egmwh6s35QKMWLrl1gWau85sY5nzViwa1SvoJFAXwiKPU=&c=xHZjREbvlziDp27nZ1uNzWC7-U0HwYad4NhNWZUD_mQk8G2vAbuyEQ==&ch=JRXuFnTogFPUMovePQOI7vEmM8GOM2-b7nHU4TdahG0wWlu0brL0nA==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Washington's 3rd Congressional District is becoming the focus of national attention as the 2022 election season heats up. This election poses questions every citizen should be asking. Who will best represent my vision for America? Who will address the concerns of my community in the national dialogue? America was built around the idea of representation-- local citizens who would go to Washington DC and voice local concerns and local issues on the national platform. Somehow we've evolved into something quite different when someone like Hillary Rodham Clinton buys a home in New York in order to represent the interests of New Yorkers in the United States Senate. Locally, we have seen several candidates suddenly appear in Washington's 3rd District with hopes of being elected to Congress. Opportunistic at best, these candidates have no history and no connection to those they seek to represent. While some have experience in Washington DC and others have experience in foreign countries only one has any significant experience in the 3rd Congressional District. Heidi St. John has lived and worked in the heart of our district for nearly 20 years, serving our community. All seven of her children still live in the district including her married, adult children and her grandchildren. Her heart will always be here. She is one of us. To be elected to speak on behalf of friends and neighbors is a high honor and not to be taken lightly. Only Heidi St John is one of us. We know her and she knows us. We have benefited from her leadership in the 3rd District for years, and we know she will represent our concerns and be our voice when she is elected. America has enough political opportunists in Washington DC already. To learn more about Heidi St John and to learn how to support her campaign, visit==. | | | | Important Contribution Deadline | This is the last week to help the campaign reach our 2nd Quarter goals. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: What Rachel Maddow just said about Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, in a few moments, [**we’re going to ask you to chip in toward our $150,000 end-of-quarter goal coming up this Wednesday, June 30.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210626?refcode=em20210626-409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=409_420207_-QLhHh&akid=409%2E420207%2E-QLhHh) But first, we wanted to explain why it’s so critical at this specific moment.
On Thursday night, Pramila was on The Rachel Maddow Show to discuss her ongoing work to secure a bold infrastructure, jobs, and families plan. She also outlined the emerging path forward for Democrats to finally get this done — _with or without Republican support._
For weeks, the progressive movement has been saying to House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and the White House that we will not move a smaller infrastructure bill unless we simultaneously have a reconciliation bill that has our priorities — like robust child care, Medicare expansion, bold climate action, immigration, and housing. **And thanks to her tireless organizing, they’re now on board.**
Here’s what Rachel Maddow had to say about this exciting victory:
> _"In terms of what was going to happen here on infrastructure — the progressives do deserve a lot of credit. What they were calling for three and four weeks ago is now what everybody in all parts of the Democratic party is agreeing to. They ought to get more credit for that stuff.”_
[**Pramila is advocating for us on every front,_every single day_. And she is able to do it because she’s funded by the people, not corporate PACs looking for special influence. But there’s a lot more work to do, and hitting our $150,000 end-of-quarter goal is critical to keeping up this incredible momentum — can you chip in $3 to support her fight for working families before time runs out?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210626?refcode=em20210626-409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=409_420207_-QLhHh&akid=409%2E420207%2E-QLhHh)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210626?refcode=em20210626-409&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=409_420207_-QLhHh&akid=409%2E420207%2E-QLhHh)**
We look forward to continuing this work with you by our side,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210626-409-footer&t=22&refcode2=409_420207_-QLhHh&akid=409%2E420207%2E-QLhHh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=409%2E420207%2E-QLhHh)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Peter,

I wanted to share with you our recent**CAMPAIGN STRATEGY MEMO** for the campaign that highlights where we stand right now. The below memo contains important strategic information about our next steps, so please, do not share or forward this correspondence.

**FOR TEAM SARAH EYES ONLY**

**If you can, please read the whole memo. It’s**** _that_ i****mportant. **

**FROM:** Chris Caldwell, Sarah For Governor Campaign Manager
**RE:** "The Plan: Defeat Sarah Huckabee Sanders"
**DATE:** 06.25.21
__________________________

**STATE OF PLAY**

Recently, a far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer's allies launched over $100,000 in attack ads against Sarah.

They think they can buy Arkansas votes with negative lies.

We're going to prove THEY'RE WRONG.

_Before our End-Of-Quarter deadline_ , we're launching a campaign to defend Sarah and asking every supporter to contribute towards our $100,000 goal to FIGHT BACK.

**The deadline for the DEFEND SARAH FUND is on June 30th at 11:59PM and we cannot afford to come up short.** That's why I'm relying on every member of Team Sarah to do our part so we can counter the far-left messaging on TV, on social media, and on the ground where it counts.

Moving forward, it's imperative that our goals meet or exceed the radical, left-wing money flooding into this race.

**We need this $100,000 to compete - and we need it in the next 5 days. **
Peter, as you can see, our End-Of-Quarter efforts are essential to our future success.

Can you make an immediate donation to our End-Of-Quarter DEFEND SARAH FUND now?

Our plan for End-of-Quarter is in the works and I’m going to need your help. Please, read the memo below and chip in whatever you can to the DEFEND SARAH FUND: I really appreciate it, Sarah | | Peter, I wanted to share with you our recentCAMPAIGN STRATEGY MEMO for the campaign that highlights where we stand right now. The below memo contains important strategic information about our next steps, so please, do not share or forward this correspondence. FOR TEAM SARAH EYES ONLY If you can, please read the whole memo. It’s that important. Once you’re finished, I think it will be clear why we need your support NOW, and I hope you will to help us fight back and win this race. TO: FROM: Chris Caldwell, Sarah For Governor Campaign Manager RE: "The Plan: Defeat Sarah Huckabee Sanders" DATE: 06.25.21 STATE OF PLAY Recently, a far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer's allies launched over $100,000 in attack ads against Sarah. They think they can buy Arkansas votes with negative lies. We're going to prove THEY'RE WRONG. Before our End-Of-Quarter deadline , we're launching a campaign to defend Sarah and asking every supporter to contribute towards our $100,000 goal to FIGHT BACK. The deadline for the DEFEND SARAH FUND is on June 30th at 11:59PM and we cannot afford to come up short. That's why I'm relying on every member of Team Sarah to do our part so we can counter the far-left messaging on TV, on social media, and on the ground where it counts. Moving forward, it's imperative that our goals meet or exceed the radical, left-wing money flooding into this race. We need this $100,000 to compete - and we need it in the next 5 days. Peter, as you can see, our End-Of-Quarter efforts are essential to our future success. Can you make an immediate donation to our End-Of-Quarter DEFEND SARAH FUND now? name: Team Padilla
subject: We have a BIG deadline coming up on Wednesday
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

June FEC Fundraising Deadline

Contribution Goal: 2,500
Deadline Day: June 30th
Suggested Donation: $3

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]DONATE NOW

Friends —

Our June FEC fundraising deadline is coming up quickly, so we wanted to
give you a quick rundown of the days ahead:

* Our big June FEC fundraising deadline is this Wednesday.
* Our goal is to get 2,500 contributions by then.
* We only have 4 days left to get it done and we still have some work to
do, so we’re coming directly to you and asking for your support.

We like to set our goals based on a number of people donating, not a
dollar amount. Because we measure the success of this campaign by the
amount of people standing with Alex and fighting for change.

And usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about hitting our goal. But it’s
critical we succeed because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump
donors funding the recall are going to set their sights on our campaign as
well.

You can see how important your support is to holding this seat, which is
why today we have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots
campaign before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end?
We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we
receive in June sends a powerful message that we will not back down
without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210626-1-15&t=1020&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]Other amount

We are going to hold this seat and our Senate majority because people like
you supported our campaign from the start.

Thank you in advance for chipping in!

Team Padilla

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210626-1-15&t=1021&refcode2=115_159979_SORL7j&akid=115%2E159979%2ESORL7j ]DONATE NOW

name: Meg Platt
subject: Our fundraising numbers are about to go public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Our FEC deadline is just days away, Friend. We set monthly, weekly, and sometimes even daily fundraising goals -- but this one is our most important deadline yet. Let me take a minute to explain why. **June 30th is the public reporting deadline, meaning our fundraising numbers for this quarter will go public** – anyone can see how much cash we've raised, spent, and have on hand. And national Republicans and super PACs across the country will be watching our fundraising numbers like a hawk. **If Republicans see any signs of weakness from us, i.e., low fundraising numbers, they'll descend upon our campaign like sharks who smell blood.** Mitch McConnell and special interest groups are already spending big on attack ads against Maggie, but weak numbers will invite even more. In a swing state like New Hampshire, that could cost us the election. **[Right now, we're still $13k short of our weekend goal. So can Maggie count on you to donate before the FEC deadline on June 30th? Just $5 today, or however much you can, will go a long way in the fight to protect this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31450550/292706832/1251890980?refcode=e20210626_FEC&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTcyYTcxNy1iY2Q2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ckqrsLs7a16V_l9hxnHkyYNWANhUJlY4lvvoUduEnLk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31450551/292706833/1251890980?refcode=e20210626_FEC&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTcyYTcxNy1iY2Q2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ckqrsLs7a16V_l9hxnHkyYNWANhUJlY4lvvoUduEnLk=)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC

clean_body: You’re one of the first to know! = Hi friend, After spending the 2020 election cycle working to keep Tom in Congress, I got to see up close and personal the type of person he is. He cares deeply about the wellbeing of all Arizonans and Americans, and he is a fighter we need in Congress. Now, the stakes are even higher. Our House majority is razor-thin, and we need all hands on deck to make sure we keep Tom and his Democratic colleagues in Congress. That’s why I’m staying on Team Tom and am proud to be his new Campaign Manager for the 2022 cycle. As a team, we’re investing early in building a grassroots campaign, because that’s what it’s going to take to win. We need to build a massive field operation, but we need the resources to make sure we can start now. That means building a strong team to achieve our goals and the grassroots momentum we need to win. We’re starting earlier than ever, and we want you to be a part of our team. = | ******=**** It’s going to take all of us coming together to keep Tom O’Halleran in Congress. I hope you’ll join me. Thank you for your support, Annika, Campaign Manager Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

| We all know the truth: China is directly responsible for the COVID-19 pandemic.
In the best case scenario, China lied about when they discovered the first outbreak, jailed journalists and disappeared doctors for daring to speak the truth, and failed to tell the world about the pandemic that began in their country.
And in the worst case scenario - which we know is not a conspiracy theory, despite what the press says - China did all of this because the communist regime knew that the virus escaped from the Wuhan Institute of Virology and that they are DIRECTLY responsible for this pandemic that killed millions.
The evidence and the commonsense support this, and we cannot let China off the hook.
Even though Democrats want to ignore China's role, I will not ignore it. I'm taking the fight to China, even if they sanction me again. I'm not backing down, and that's why I reintroduced a plan that would give YOU the power to sue the Chinese government for what they've done.

Our messaging is working. Democrats are scrambling.
A new poll released this week found that [80 PERCENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VElPvrdOnWxHXgXBYhaF7zgKZT50yhG6M04v7WrqA8MWegcAfcC3SUybl_OlmNgGJ6N2fdxhrzd0SOxLQtiYKpnYUVEVW5CwnHl7sVM6jbN0TOd9xsTUECmQVTnJWaYuQ5X-ZOiNZ4N_dauCHg9QND7D7ocDmMcNumQrhXxL9ZCjaw8lBu29r4jP7biAxHAA&c=sqMS9K0OxFbhlg0YvxZ7cdAWIvcDLBZn9OgsPvD6zjmmcVJYew8Lpg==&ch=jgXCK3UPruKKhefXXz9ebd6UjtiBt8gKgaU2TdsSxeypu_BmTtGD8Q==) of voters agree with voter ID requirements in elections.
Despite the socialist left's relentless narrative to lie about common sense voting laws in states like Texas and Georgia, Americans didn't buy it. They know ID requirements aren't "racist," or "voter suppression," or "Jim Crow 2.0."
And now, the left is scared. They know their lies didn't work. And they know it didn't work because YOU HELPED fund a messaging campaign that exposed their lies.
With your help, the public learned the truth about common sense election integrity measures like voter ID. And now the left is trying to rewrite history.
We need to ramp up our messaging strategy on everything from Critical Race Theory to Medicare for All to Defunding the Police.
We are going to expose the left's radical, socialist agenda until the American people wake up to the dangers of giving Democrats any more power.
I need your help to do that... are you in?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to stress the need to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for spreading the COVID-19 pandemic around the world. I also continued to debunk the lies that Democrats are spreading about election integrity efforts in states like Texas. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | SUE CHINA | == | == | We all know the truth: China is directly responsible for the COVID-19 pandemic. In the best case scenario, China lied about when they discovered the first outbreak, jailed journalists and disappeared doctors for daring to speak the truth, and failed to tell the world about the pandemic that began in their country. And in the worst case scenario - which we know is not a conspiracy theory, despite what the press says - China did all of this because the communist regime knew that the virus escaped from the Wuhan Institute of Virology and that they are DIRECTLY responsible for this pandemic that killed millions. The evidence and the commonsense support this, and we cannot let China off the hook. Even though Democrats want to ignore China's role, I will not ignore it. I'm taking the fight to China, even if they sanction me again. I'm not backing down, and that's why I reintroduced a plan that would give YOU the power to sue the Chinese government for what they've done. But we need Nancy Pelosi to bring this bill to the floor. == | | | | THIS IS WHY EFFECTIVE MESSAGING WORKS | == | == Our messaging is working. Democrats are scrambling. A new poll released this week found that == of voters agree with voter ID requirements in elections. Despite the socialist left's relentless narrative to lie about common sense voting laws in states like Texas and Georgia, Americans didn't buy it. They know ID requirements aren't "racist," or "voter suppression," or "Jim Crow 2.0." And now, the left is scared. They know their lies didn't work. And they know it didn't work because YOU HELPED fund a messaging campaign that exposed their lies. With your help, the public learned the truth about common sense election integrity measures like voter ID. And now the left is trying to rewrite history. We need to ramp up our messaging strategy on everything from Critical Race Theory to Medicare for All to Defunding the Police. We are going to expose the left's radical, socialist agenda until the American people wake up to the dangers of giving Democrats any more power. I need your help to do that... are you in? | | | == | | | | ONE WEEK UNTIL THE 4TH OF JULY...YOU DON'T WANT TO MISS THIS PARTY | == | == I promised you an epic party on July 4... and I meant it! Join us at Lago Mar in Texas City for a live concert, live DJ with drone light show that you can watch floating on the lagoon or partying on the beach. The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. body:
We must secure our southern border | President Trump is heading to the southern border soon to see firsthand the utter devastation caused...
**[WE MUST FINISH TRUMP'S WALL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57814155:JYlR6hlNN:m:1:3253819041:A4CFA90BA3D86E1D70E23B1FF6E8933D:r)**
Peter,

Did you hear the news?

President Trump is heading to the southern border soon to see firsthand the __utter devastation caused by the Biden border crisis.__ Unlike the current administration, **President Trump's TOP priority was SECURING our border to keep Americans SAFE.**

President Trump's beautiful border wall protected ALL Americans from **dangerous illegal immigrants** , but now the Left-wing MOB wants to OPEN our borders and RISK your safety.

We need to show radical Democrats that American patriots, like YOU, still stand with President Trump and his **America FIRST policies.**
**[DO YOU AGREE WE NEED TO FINISH PRESIDENT TRUMP'S BORDER WALL?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57814155:JYlR6hlNN:m:1:3253819041:A4CFA90BA3D86E1D70E23B1FF6E8933D:r)**

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Join Me Tomorrow for RINO Roast!
body:
We're celebrating the one year anniversary of defending our home from the mob.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XrT69AgoQ-YTka2UeDdkuMoG6zwVNlRuhztT7fPPTQ1DHzKyygyQZ2vwISpk8Ej77RnaDK0n99u0fMirGxIcmMxDwXUzfgUn4KNqs9smwxQycGVCD9eO1AiudJKqz-8qUIVsfScQ2QG8iHfUCs-5Vloj8ZTQCeGW3aRY4O8gmjghGnumTHxdFBP9zgyICu-dxnjBGL56_XjwNwpwyFqz5mnBsdNZiCqlF4pM5LBDAx01H9zDei_zNA==&c=UNd0Kj9Vjz_qR_DBc6hhhFaHxgaz0XGbiLWH-v_tmJbMqwMobpt1GA==&ch=kN_RL5_Y3IGGhxmPM6sakYiUI7Q36rDno9_2dppn_0dwk5y8-zrCfA==)
---
| Fellow Conservative,
One year ago, an angry mob marched onto my property and threatened to kill my family and burn down my house. My wife Patty and I held them off by exercising our 2nd Amendment rights.
And to celebrate the ONE YEAR anniversary of the event, we're throwing a big party tomorrow, and you're invited! So come out and join us tomorrow (Sunday) from 2-8 at Drive in St. Louis, check out the details below!
We'll be gathered (WITHOUT MASKS) to talk about the direction of the country, winning back the SENATE from the socialist Democrats, and how we can keep the Republican Party clear of RINO'S now and in the future. So come out, eat some great barbecue, and celebrate our freedom with fellow Conservatives in Missouri.
If you're in or around St. Louis, we'd LOVE for you to drop by so we can meet you. There will be food, live music and adult beverages provided, along with special guest Congressman Madison Cawthorn!
Click the button below to reserve your ticket.
---
| | | [RESERVE YOUR TICKET NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XrT69AgoQ-YTka2UeDdkuMoG6zwVNlRuhztT7fPPTQ1DHzKyygyQZ2vwISpk8Ej77RnaDK0n99u0fMirGxIcmMxDwXUzfgUn4KNqs9smwxQycGVCD9eO1AiudJKqz-8qUIVsfScQ2QG8iHfUCs-5Vloj8ZTQCeGW3aRY4O8gmjghGnumTHxdFBP9zgyICu-dxnjBGL56_XjwNwpwyFqz5mnBsdNZiCqlF4pM5LBDAx01H9zDei_zNA==&c=UNd0Kj9Vjz_qR_DBc6hhhFaHxgaz0XGbiLWH-v_tmJbMqwMobpt1GA==&ch=kN_RL5_Y3IGGhxmPM6sakYiUI7Q36rDno9_2dppn_0dwk5y8-zrCfA==)

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XrT69AgoQ-YTka2UeDdkuMoG6zwVNlRuhztT7fPPTQ1DHzKyygyQZ2vwISpk8Ej77RnaDK0n99u0fMirGxIcmMxDwXUzfgUn4KNqs9smwxQycGVCD9eO1AiudJKqz-8qUIVsfScQ2QG8iHfUCs-5Vloj8ZTQCeGW3aRY4O8gmjghGnumTHxdFBP9zgyICu-dxnjBGL56_XjwNwpwyFqz5mnBsdNZiCqlF4pM5LBDAx01H9zDei_zNA==&c=UNd0Kj9Vjz_qR_DBc6hhhFaHxgaz0XGbiLWH-v_tmJbMqwMobpt1GA==&ch=kN_RL5_Y3IGGhxmPM6sakYiUI7Q36rDno9_2dppn_0dwk5y8-zrCfA==)

Mark McCloskey

We still need 5 more donors from 18326 to chip in to our campaign to stay on track towards our $25,000 end-of-quarter goal.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Urgent news!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Deadline coming |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d11e88ccf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

It’s the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, Mark Finchem.

**And I am writing you today with urgent news.**

**_We are only days away from our fundraising deadline, and we need to raise $50,000 – or all of our election audit progress could be in vain._**

Let me tell you why.

**Through your continued support as well as through the support of one of the largest grassroots movements in this century, we have made impressive strides in proving there was fraud in the 2020 election, despite:**

** -A FAILED recall effort against me for fighting for Election Integrity**
** -Media assaults against myself and the movement**
** -Painting Conservatives involved with the audit as insane, liars, or incompetent.**

This is because the Liberals can run all they want, but they can’t hide.

**They can fight back and scratch with their claws, but this is America, and God and Freedom are on our side.**

**_Donate TODAY to keep the Radical Left from stealing more elections for the Democrats!_**

We have found substantial evidence of fraud and we will continue the fight all the way to the Supreme Court if we need to!

**And this is a fire that is spreading. **

[_Donate TODAY to turn this country around. Let’s get back on track and save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e0458aa71d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fed802e9d5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_Michigan, Georgia, Pennsylvania. They are all looking at following in our footsteps to demonstrate that the 2020 election was STOLEN from Donald Trump._**

But this is just the first battle in a long war against the Radical Left.

**The first step is proving there was fraud.**

**_The second is making sure it can’t happen again. And if we do not hit our URGENT end of month fundraising goal of $50,000 by June 30th, the very office of the Secretary of State – the office that oversees elections – is at stake._**

I have fought from the beginning, spend money out of pocket, and poured my blood, sweat, and tears into this grassroots movements.

**This spark ignited a flame that has spread across the country, and this flame WILL burn away the hiding places of election fraud around the country. It’s already happening.**
**_Imagine what I could do as Secretary of State!_**

If you donate TODAY, and we reach our fundraising goal of $50,000 by the end of the month, 2020 will never happen again and the Democrats will be put in their place.

**And by their place, I of course mean jail. We will make sure that we prosecute to the fullest extent of the law anyone who is found to have perpetrated election fraud.**

**_This is a cancer in our Democracy, and we will cut it out._**

**But I need your help!**

[_Donate TODAY to save our Democracy from the Radical Left and Election Fraud! This is our last chance!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ba66b777e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7d18b601b8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There is no time left to save our Democracy.

**The Democrats have declared war on our Democracy and now they want to hide like the cowards they are.**

_We will uncover the fraud. And when we do, the fight really begins._

**_We need to install Secretary of State’s around the country that will ensure elections are protected against Democrat steal attempts!_**

_[Will you help the cause?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=800cf8764b&e=44b8c466b0)_

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the true grassroots Election Integrity Conservative.**

**_[But all of this fails without your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=be7d1106a7&e=44b8c466b0)_**

Will you help us reach our fundraising goal of $50,000 by the end of the month. Everything helps in the fight!

[_Donate as much as you can to save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=20422d4ff5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=09c1c62e0b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f12d700ce4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=87337baec7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=87337baec7).

name: Team Sarah
subject: Impossible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
**FIRST:** Democrats elected President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris, and took back the Senate majority by the slimmest of margins.

**THEN:** Ron Johnson and Senate Republicans made it clear that they will abuse the filibuster to block all of our progressive priorities -- including protecting the right to vote.

**NOW:** Sarah Godlewski is running for the U.S. Senate to take down Ron Johnson, expand our razor-thin majority, and get rid of the filibuster so we can move our country forward.

**[This won't be an easy fight. Sarah needs your help to get the job done. Can she count on you to chip in your first donation to our campaign ahead of our first end-of-quarter deadline? If you've been waiting for the right moment to give, now is the time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31454706/292718542/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19542&refcode=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDExYzIzZi1kMmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2inZvBNswbyEih0XYFg_AXlmhFDbAAdrJ18P7AtDl0=)**
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31454708/292718544/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19542&refcode=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDExYzIzZi1kMmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2inZvBNswbyEih0XYFg_AXlmhFDbAAdrJ18P7AtDl0=)

Taking on Ron Johnson and his deep-pocketed allies might seem like an impossible task, but here's the truth: _CNN_ has listed Ron Johnson as the most vulnerable incumbent Republican senator up for re-election in 2022. This seat is ripe for the taking.

**That doesn't mean beating this guy will be easy -- but as Sarah always says: nothing worth fighting for ever is.**

**[Help Sarah Godlewski take on Ron Johnson by adding your first donation before our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign. Even $1 will make a huge difference. Together, we can defeat Ron Johnson, expand our Senate majority, and get rid of the filibuster.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31454711/292718547/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19542&refcode=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210626_EOQ6_fnd_gq_ndn__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDExYzIzZi1kMmQ2LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2inZvBNswbyEih0XYFg_AXlmhFDbAAdrJ18P7AtDl0=)**

Thank you,

clean_body: FIRST: Democrats elected President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris, and took back the Senate majority by the slimmest of margins. THEN: Ron Johnson and Senate Republicans made it clear that they will abuse the filibuster to block all of our progressive priorities -- including protecting the right to vote. NOW: Sarah Godlewski is running for the U.S. Senate to take down Ron Johnson, expand our razor-thin majority, and get rid of the filibuster so we can move our country forward. = | = Taking on Ron Johnson and his deep-pocketed allies might seem like an impossible task, but here's the truth: CNN has listed Ron Johnson as the most vulnerable incumbent Republican senator up for re-election in 2022. This seat is ripe for the taking. That doesn't mean beating this guy will be easy -- but as Sarah always says: nothing worth fighting for ever is. = Thank you, Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Charlie Crist
subject: I love Florida with all my heart.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
But Ron DeSantis loves running for President.
|
---

| | Friend,

I love Florida. I love her with all my heart -- and I love the people of this great state the most. I'm running for governor because right now, more than ever, the people of Florida need a governor that fights for them in Tallahassee. And that's unfortunately not what we're getting out of Ron DeSantis. | [DONATE TO DEFEAT RON DESANTIS](https://act.myngp.com/el/aMXKMDJnZrpRWTcYH4Sl8g==/BMf25T_ySiPeXGIGnTjjKQ==?refcode=20210624_f_1_nd&amount=25)
---
He's signing bills that appeal to right-wing Republicans nationally instead of ones that help Floridians. He restricted voting rights even though Florida had one of the smoothest elections in our history. And he's turning away education funds that could help Florida's school kids impacted by the pandemic.

Why would he do all this? The answer is simple: he's running for president. While Floridians struggle to recover from the pandemic, DeSantis is jet-setting in California raising money from extremely wealthy, ideological donors, people with no real interest or stake in what's happening in Florida.

I've lived in Florida basically my whole life. She's a special place. While DeSantis has been off running around the country, I've been meeting with Floridians from every walk of life. And one thing is clear: It's time for a Florida for all.

Florida deserves better than Ron DeSantis, but I need your help to win this election. Together we can make it clear that Florida is not a stepping stone to higher office -- it's a special place with special people, who deserve a governor that answers to _them_ , not wealthy out-of-state donors.

**If you 're able, please pitch in $5, $10, or anything you can today to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Together, we can make Florida a place where everyone can get ahead.**

Charlie

Every day it seems we uncover new details about the Capitol insurrection and Donald Trump's involvement in it.

This week, we learned that Donald Trump had his Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, bombard Deputy Attorney General Jeffrey Rosen with emails touting bizarre and patently false allegations of election fraud in the 2020 election in the hopes that he would open an investigation into the matter.

Thankfully, Rosen never followed through on the claims, which his own deputy called “pure insanity,” but that doesn't mean we shouldn't hold Trump and his lackeys accountable for attempting to use the Attorney General office to spread the Big Lie.

**[HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31455538/292720467/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210626_GEN_FDR_K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJhYTE4ZTcyLWQ2ZDYtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DWd4qpqOUC7GWjU6_aHPqhnz_7SkjnRh0szmODS-5Ss=)**
---

Peter, luckily, 14 of the Republican senators who voted to throw out Trump's impeachment trial are up for reelection in 2022. We're leading the movement to unseat every single one of those Trump loyalists and the countless elected officials in our government who parrot Trump's ideology and embrace his no-holds-barred opposition to progress.

We know we can only win this fight against extremism through sustained grassroots support, just like we did in 2020. We will fund progressive Democrats in tight races across the country \-- not at the last minute, but right now, when candidates are building their platforms, speaking with communities, and helping register voters.

**[But those same Republicans are already pulling ahead of us this year, and we need to raise $5,580 in the next two days just to keep from shrinking our budgets.
