subject: It's Official: Gavin Newsom Will Face a Recall!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
And it’s about time. This past week, Newsom’s lies made headlines as journalists revealed that he has misled the public. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/8jt85jsn9d-4940274?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=68fe1996ef&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=030060f887&e=b8a6795190)
---
# It’s Official: Gavin Newsom Will Face a Recall
“**Only 43 of the more than 1.7 million Californians** who signed a petition to recall Gov. Gavin Newsom withdrew their signatures over the last several weeks, according to the Secretary of State’s office,” [The Sacramento Bee reported](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ae53a0d77e&e=b8a6795190) Wednesday. The recall is on and it’s about time. **Newsom is playing with fire (literally).** This past week, Newsom’s lies [made headlines](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9088e70837&e=b8a6795190) when the governor was exposed for misleading the public about his wildfire prevention efforts. The scandal broke Wednesday when investigative journalists followed the smoke and uncovered the ugly truth. According to the [CapRadio exclusive](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f5ef9811e4&e=b8a6795190), “The investigation found **Newsom overstated, by an astounding 690%,** the number of acres treated with fuel breaks and prescribed burns in the very forestry projects he said needed to be prioritized to protect the state’s most vulnerable communities”.
Joining [**KUSI’s Logan Byrnes**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=911f3d6c9b&e=b8a6795190), John addressed [**CapRadio and NPR’s California Newsroom**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=6cd5ec7a60&e=b8a6795190) investigation.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c25878c9bd&e=b8a6795190)
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=dd198e5054&e=b8a6795190)
## You Call This “Roaring Back”?
Newsom has not only misled the public in his wildfire management, he’s also been desperately trying to convince us that California is “roaring back”. All you have to do is look at the data to see this isn’t remotely true. According to the [**Bureau of Economic Analysis**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3ed5c7affe&e=b8a6795190)**, California’s economic growth is, in fact, behind its neighboring states**. What’s worse, Californians are still struggling to find work. Earlier this week, [East Bay Times reported](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8347afd16d&e=b8a6795190): “**California accounted for 17% of all of the jobless claims filed nationwide** last week — even though California has only 11.8% of the nation’s workforce.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=4ce4b9e31f&e=b8a6795190)
## Changing the Rules
Political insiders are changing the rules, yet again, as Democrats prepare the recall election. According to [Los Angeles Times](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=fcb312d281&e=b8a6795190), **“The legislation introduced Friday goes much further than just offering a speedy election during which voters could remove Newsom from office.** It also would require the recall to be conducted as a ‘regular election,’ a change that is likely to prohibit some counties from implementing voting rules and procedures used in last November’s presidential election.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=026b861216&e=b8a6795190)
## Your Support Makes a Difference
The recall election is official and [**John Cox is leading in the polls**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=20e9756998&e=b8a6795190)**** to be California’s next governor, and all we need now is support from grassroots patriots like you. John has a great shot at winning this election, but he can’t do it alone. He needs your help to stop Newsom’s lies and turn this state around.
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a8467bd4cf&e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d3de2e37ec&e=b8a6795190)
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d9437a4949&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a585fdd901&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=29ea4b9310&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=4f7e183f24&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d5dc30d4eb&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
## [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8de7de3c71&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc. FPPC ID #14377013525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
[Add us to your address book](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256) [Update Preferences](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=ffa1ae9017) | [Unsubscribe](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=ffa1ae9017)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Announcement: This could destroy the Biden Presidency
body:
Peter,

**Only one thing is stopping Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer from implementing their radical agenda - our hold on the Senate. **

They are already plotting their 2022 election plans to expand their majority...

Fortunately, my friend Mike Gibbons could foil all of their plans.

Mike Gibbons is running for Senate in an open seat in Ohio that Biden and Harris DESPERATELY need to win if they wish to keep the Senate in 2022.
